notes: v1.2.2 — Critical fix: auto-updater now follows GitHub release CDN redirects (was downloading a tiny redirect response and trying to run it as an installer, causing 'This app can't run on your PC'). Also verifies HTTP 200, waits for file flush, and rejects suspiciously tiny downloads. Includes all v1.2.1 fixes (login loop, logout-once, navigate URL log).
